auroraVikingDashboardReference.usageNotes: Pending manual upload outside the Codex PR flow; do not use as live gallery content or companion portrait.

notes: This manifest is intentionally binary-free for Codex PR compatibility.
PNG/JPG/WebP assets must be uploaded manually outside the Codex PR flow before being listed under assets or icons.
Semantic icons fall back to the existing admin icon library until uploaded icon assets are manually installed.
